About Me

Hi I am blanpa ,

I am an IIoT Software Developer with an Industrial Engineering background. I build industrial connectivity solutions that bridge the gap between shop floor and cloud — from edge gateways and fieldbus protocols to real-time messaging and predictive maintenance.

My focus areas include developing open-source Node-RED modules for industrial use cases such as condition monitoring, OPC-UA communication, NATS messaging, and IoT gateway integration. I combine strong technical knowledge in embedded systems, data engineering, and cloud infrastructure with hands-on project management experience.

IIOT Software Developer

2024 — present

As an Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) Software Developer, I specialize in crafting and implementing sophisticated software solutions tailored for industrial applications. Leveraging the power of emerging technologies such as IoT, cloud computing, and data analytics, I engage in designing, developing, and maintaining software applications that facilitate real-time data collection, processing, and analysis from a multitude of industrial devices and systems.

Process Engineer - Industrial Engineering

2022 — 2023

Analyze existing manufacturing processes, identify areas for improvement, and develop strategies to optimize efficiency, reduce costs, and enhance product quality. Lead process validation activities, including protocol development, execution, and documentation in compliance with regulatory standards. Collaborate with R&D teams to transfer new products from development to production, ensuring seamless integration and efficient manufacturing processes. Implement Lean Manufacturing principles and Six Sigma methodologies to drive process improvements, reduce waste, and increase productivity. Perform root cause analysis and lead corrective and preventive actions (CAPAs) to resolve process deviations and non-conformities. Participate in risk assessments and develop risk mitigation strategies for manufacturing processes. Work closely with cross-functional teams to introduce new equipment, tools, and technologies to improve manufacturing efficiency and quality. Develop and maintain accurate documentation, including process flowcharts, standard operating procedures (SOPs), and work instructions. Train production operators on new processes and equipment, ensuring compliance with safety guidelines and quality standards. Stay updated with industry trends and advancements in manufacturing processes, and proactively propose innovative solutions to enhance our capabilities.
